merged_events.event_description: Embassy Lourenco Marques (now Maputo) was opened with Johnnie Carson as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Embassy Lourenco Marques (now Maputo) was opened on November 8, 1975, with Johnnie Carson as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the opening of Embassy Lourenco Marques (now Maputo) on 1975-11-08. High confidence RDCR source with verified citation.
